Somatic Anchor

863 Hz Larmor Grounding Tool
LIVE Cloudflare WorkerWeb Audio APIVibration API
⬡ Launch Somatic Anchor ← Back to Hub

What it is

Wellness / grounding aid only — not medical treatment; stop if you feel worse and seek appropriate care. 863 Hz Larmor Grounding Tool is a core component of the P31 Labs sovereign cognitive infrastructure stack — built to run offline, deployed to the edge, and designed without dark patterns.

Web Audio API generates the 863 Hz tone via an OscillatorNode — no audio file to download. Vibration API drives the haptic guide. All state resets on close — no data stored. Short p31ca.org URL 302 → workers.dev (probe: worker-spa-somatic-anchor).

Core features

Wellness / grounding aid only — not medical treatment; stop if you feel worse and seek appropriate care

4-4-6 box breathing with visual cue — inhale 4, hold 4, exhale 6

863 Hz Larmor frequency tone (³¹P in Earth's field) as a somatic anchor point

5-4-3-2-1 grounding exercise with visual and haptic prompts

Haptic pulse patterns via Vibration API — works on Android without earbuds

No timer pressure — you set the pace; the app follows

How to use

1Open when dysregulated — the breathing guide starts automatically
2Plug in earbuds and enable the 863 Hz tone for the full somatic effect
3Complete the 5-4-3-2-1 exercise at the end — takes about 3 minutes total

Architecture

Web Audio API generates the 863 Hz tone via an OscillatorNode — no audio file to download. Vibration API drives the haptic guide. All state resets on close — no data stored. Short p31ca.org URL 302 → workers.dev (probe: worker-spa-somatic-anchor).
P31 Labs, Inc. (Georgia nonprofit, EIN 42-1888158) builds open tools for cognitive sovereignty, communication clarity, and family coordination. This page is technical documentation, not medical or legal advice. Mission and support: phosphorus31.org.

Build Intake and bake on the same verify chain—not a decoupled mock. Create One lab surface, honest rigidity—generate or prove; don't fork the same truth twice (ephemeralization). Connect Now — live cage and edges: mesh, hubs, and money follow the same published contracts (ethical monetization).
